description_html:

Ashwagandha (Withania somnifera) is one of the most versatile adaptogenic herbs known to man. Each capsule of Jacked Factory KSM-66® Ashwagandha w/Astragin™ contains a clinical 600 mg dose of KSM-66® organic ashwagandha root extract that provides at least 5% total withanolides. Our ashwagandha supplement also features 25 mg of Astragin™ (Panax notoginseng and Astragalus membranaceous extracts) per serving to enhance the absorption of beneficial withanolides found in ashwagandha root.

 

Ashwagandha is a multifunctional adaptogen that has numerous clinical studies backing its benefits. Scientific research continues to uncover the diverse therapeutic properties of withanolides in ashwagandha and how they can help improve mood, counteract stress, enhance cognitive function, promote healthy sleep, and even support testosterone levels in men.

Key Benefits

  • Clinically dosed KSM-66® with Astragin™

  • Standardized to 5% bioactive withanolides for proper potency

  • Improve mood, control stress, enhance focus, & support relaxation

  • Manufactured in the USA in a cGMP certified facility

  • 100% Hassle-Free Money-Back Guarantee 

 

Ingredients
